response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to agentic workflows at re:cinq, but lacks demonstrable leadership in scaling AI systems in regulated fintech, has no explicit experience with real-time credit risk or working-capital systems, and his leadership roles appear more technical contributor than executive architect.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic AI infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven track record in distributed systems, event-driven architectures, and real-time data apps
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication via workshops and talks
concerns: No clear evidence of leading engineering teams from 10 to 30+ or developing senior technical leadership layers
Lacks documented experience in fintech infrastructure, regulatory compliance, or credit-risk systems
No demonstrable production deployment of multi-agent systems with feedback loops or financial decisioning
